source_rationale: KRT7 is a type II cytokeratin expressed in simple epithelia, marking this as an epithelial cell cluster
KRT17 is a basal epithelial cytokeratin associated with airway basal/progenitor epithelial cells
CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark epithelial adhesion molecule confirming epithelial identity
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase expressed by airway epithelial cells, particularly in club/progenitor cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in airway progenitor cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific ETS transcription factor important for airway epithelial differentiation
CLDN4 is a tight junction protein characteristic of epithelial cells
CD24 is a surface glycoprotein expressed on epithelial progenitor cells in the lung
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor highly expressed in lung epithelial cells
SOX4 is a transcription factor associated with epithelial progenitor/transit-amplifying cells
MHC class II molecule highly expressed on professional antigen-presenting cells including dendritic cells
WDFY4 is specifically expressed in conventional dendritic cells type 1 (cDC1) and is required for cross-presentation
CADM1 is a well-established surface marker for cDC1 dendritic cells
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in conventional dendritic cells
CST3 (cystatin C) is highly expressed in dendritic cells and monocyte-derived cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is essential for MHC II antigen presentation in dendritic cells
HLA-DRA is a core MHC class II gene highly expressed in antigen-presenting dendritic cells
S100B expression in dendritic cells has been associated with cDC1 identity in certain tissues
High MHC class II expression indicates professional antigen-presenting cell identity
CCL17 is a chemokine produced by activated dendritic cells, particularly cDC2
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by activated myeloid/dendritic cells in tissue repair contexts
GPR183 (EBI2) is expressed on dendritic cells and guides their migration in tissues
AXL is a receptor tyrosine kinase marking a transitional DC population (AXL+ DCs/AS-DCs)
CD74 is the MHC II invariant chain, essential for antigen presentation in dendritic cells
ENTPD1 (CD39) is expressed on activated dendritic cells and regulatory immune cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
CD3D is a T cell receptor complex component confirming T cell identity
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease in cytotoxic granules of effector T cells
GNLY (granulysin) is an antimicrobial protein in cytotoxic lymphocyte granules
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ cytotoxic T cell differentiation
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a chemokine produced by activated cytotoxic T cells
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine highly expressed in activated T cells
S100B is a marker of Langerhans cells and certain dendritic cell subsets
CD1A is a definitive marker of Langerhans cells and Langerhans-like dendritic cells
FCER1A (high-affinity IgE receptor alpha) is expressed on Langerhans cells and cDC2
CD1E is a lipid antigen-presenting molecule expressed on Langerhans cells
ENTPD1 (CD39) is expressed on Langerhans cells and activated dendritic cells
Non-classical MHC II gene expressed in specialized antigen-presenting Langerhans cells
CD86 is a costimulatory molecule on antigen-presenting cells including Langerhans cells
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is expressed by Langerhans cells and supports tissue organization
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan highly expressed by fibroblasts in connective tissue
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) is a marker of adipose-associated and alveolar fibroblasts
COL1A2 is a major collagen gene expressed by matrix-producing fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
IGFBP6 is an IGF-binding protein expressed by quiescent/resting fibroblasts
SFRP2 is a Wnt signaling modulator marking a specific fibroblast subpopulation
C3 complement component is produced by lung fibroblasts as part of innate immunity
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin marking club cells/secretory airway epithelial cells
SCGB1A1 (CC10/uteroglobin) is the canonical marker of club cells in the airway
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor produced by club and secretory cells
WFDC2 (HE4) is a secretory protein expressed by club and secretory epithelial cells
BPIFB1 is an innate defense protein secreted by airway secretory cells
PIGR (polymeric immunoglobulin receptor) is expressed on secretory airway epithelial cells
LCN2 (lipocalin 2) is an antimicrobial protein produced by secretory epithelial cells
MUC4 is a membrane-bound mucin expressed by secretory airway epithelial cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule in NK cells and cytotoxic T cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor marking NK and NKT cells
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on NK cells and innate-like lymphocytes
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule-associated protein in NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is part of the TCR/NK receptor signaling complex
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine produced by NK cells and ILC subsets
XCL2 is a chemokine co-expressed with XCL1 in NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK cell receptor characteristic of NK cells
CD7 is a surface marker expressed on NK cells and T cell subsets
MCTP2 is enriched in tissue-resident NK cells
KLRB1 (CD161) is a hallmark marker of ILC3 and innate-like T cells
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on ILCs and memory T cells, essential for ILC maintenance
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by tissue-resident ILC2s for tissue repair
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for ILC development and identity
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILCs and NK cells

SPP1 (osteopontin) marks SPP1+ macrophages, a pro-fibrotic macrophage subset

APOE is expressed in lipid-handling macrophages

GPRC5A expression along with mesothelial markers suggests mesothelial identity
COL1A2 is a major fibrillar collagen gene expressed by matrix-producing fibroblasts

LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
